title: i-Differentiate Area 4 Implementation Plan
scope_summary: Phased implementation plan for a single-file HTML gamification leaderboard replacing the Area 4 Excel tracker. Covers app shell with design tokens, state/scoring engine with workbook-parity tests, TMI CSV ingestion with CORS fallback, manual entry, snapshots/movement, trends charting, settings with weight editor, and JSON export/import. Built in vanilla ES2020 JS with localStorage persistence and Chart.js via CDN; subordinate to the design spec.
scope: index.html app shell and design tokens
manual entry (awards, club health, minutes extractor)
notes: Type and precedence supplied by manifest; document is a phased implementation plan supplied as LOCKED context subordinate to the design spec.
